Docs / API / ScraperConfig

On this page

  • Overview
  • Methods

ScraperConfig

Configuration options for the scraper. Uses the builder pattern for ergonomic setup.

Methods

with_images()

Enable image downloading. Supported formats: PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, BMP.

with_documents()

Enable document downloading. Supported formats: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX.

with_output_dir(path)

Set the output directory for downloaded assets.

with_scraper_concurrency(n)

Set the maximum number of concurrent scrapers. Default: 3 (HDD-aware).

Examples

let config = ScraperConfig::default()
    .with_images()
    .with_documents()
    .with_output_dir("./output".into())
    .with_scraper_concurrency(5);

assert!(config.download_images);
assert!(config.download_documents);
assert_eq!(config.scraper_concurrency, 5);
